title: gladiolus communis subsp. notarisii
intro: Gladiolus communis subsp. notarisii, also known as the Italian Gladiolus, is a subspecies of the Gladiolus communis plant, which is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Gladiolus communis subsp. notarisii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
